name: @forgeax/engine-shader
description: Runtime shader registry — content-addressable manifest lookup → rhi.createShaderModule. Physically isolated from the build-time triple @forgeax/engine-shader-compiler / @forgeax/engine-naga / @forgeax/engine-wgpu-wasm (AC-06 三重闸门 grep 守护).

fps.reason: runtime registry without canvas; fps reported by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps that consume the registry

bench.reason: manifest-lookup path is not perf-critical; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

gate.reason: physical-isolation grep gates (check-shader-no-naga-in-dist + check-shader-runtime-deps + check-shader-no-compiler-import) are repo-root scripts wired into ci.yml lint job, not a per-package gate
